markets.question: Will Israel launch a major ground offensive in Lebanon by March 31?
markets.eventTitle: Will Israel launch a major ground offensive in Lebanon by March 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Israel initiates a major ground offensive in Lebanon by March 31, 2026, 11:59PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A "major ground offensive" is defined as a large-scale military operation that involves more than 1,000 Israeli ground forces entering Lebanese territory that was not under Israeli control at the start of the offensive. markets.question: Nuggets vs. Suns
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 24 at 11:00PM ET:
If the Nuggets win, the market will resolve to "Nuggets".
If the Suns win, the market will resolve to "Suns".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.
